note: Bridge submodule of paragraphs_ee that brings the enhanced tile dialog to Paragraphs Sets. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented integration facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: What does the paragraphs_ee_sets submodule do?
evals.expected_output: It brings the Paragraphs Editor Enhancements tile dialog to Paragraphs Sets, showing predefined reusable sets as icon tiles in a dedicated 'Paragraphs Sets' group in the enhanced add dialog.

evals.prompt: Which two modules does paragraphs_ee_sets depend on?
evals.expected_output: It depends on paragraphs_ee and paragraphs_sets (it is a bridge between them).

evals.prompt: Under what widget conditions does paragraphs_ee_sets actually restyle the set buttons?
evals.expected_output: Only when the widget has Paragraphs Sets enabled (paragraphs_sets.use_paragraphs_sets) and add mode is 'modal'.

evals.prompt: How are Paragraphs Sets presented relative to individual paragraph types in the enhanced dialog?
evals.expected_output: The set buttons are collected into a separate 'Paragraphs Sets' category tab/group, kept apart from individual paragraph types.

evals.prompt: Where does the icon shown on each Paragraphs Set tile come from in paragraphs_ee_sets?
evals.expected_output: From the set's own icon via ParagraphsSet::getIconUrl(); sets without an icon get a default placeholder image.

evals.prompt: How does paragraphs_ee_sets make sure its widget alterations run after paragraphs_ee and paragraphs_sets?
evals.expected_output: It sets its install-time module weight to 20 and implements hook_module_implements_alter() to move its field_widget_complete_form_alter to the end.
